title: BL9 8QZ, Pilsworth Forest (1996) Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/BS7951IB/V019
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Pilsworth Forest (1996) Limited   Installation name: Pilsworth South Landfill Site   Permit number: EPR/BS7951IB/V019   "
